name: Yukselen Celik Anonim Sirketi
summary: Yukselen Celik Anonim Sirketi manufactures and sells iron and steel products in Turkey, Europe, the Middle East, and North Africa. The company offers carbon, manufacturing, structural, alloy and mon-alloy, tooling stainless, skilled, and unskilled iron and steel products under the DSS, POLDI, TOOLGO, WESS, Y√É¬úKSELEN, and ETE brands for use in various industries, including machinery, automotive, formwork, iron and steel, ship, construction, and railway industries. Its products include round steel, flat and square, sheets and plates, hexagon and bright, pipes, special grade products, and forgings. The also imports, exports, buys, and sells iron and steel products. The company was formerly known as Yukselen Celik Ticaret Limited Sirketi and changed its name to Yukselen Celik Anonim Sirketi in January 2013. Yukselen Celik Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
